nodes.name: Lead Intake Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives raw lead data from web forms, chat widgets, or API integrations. Expects JSON body with at minimum an email or company_domain field.

nodes.name: Normalize Lead Data
nodes.notes: Cleans and normalizes raw input: email validation, domain extraction, free email detection, field mapping from various source formats.

nodes.name: Has Valid Identifiers?
nodes.notes: Gate: only proceed if we have at least an email or company domain to enrich.

nodes.name: Apollo — Company Enrichment
nodes.notes: Fetches company data from Apollo.io: industry, size, funding, tech stack.

nodes.name: Clearbit — Company Enrichment
nodes.notes: Fetches company data from Clearbit: industry, headcount, revenue, technographics.

nodes.name: Apollo — Contact Enrichment
nodes.notes: Fetches contact data from Apollo: title, seniority, department, phone, LinkedIn.

nodes.name: Merge Enrichment Results
nodes.notes: Merges parallel enrichment results. Scalar fields use 'first non-null wins'. Lists are unioned and deduplicated.

nodes.name: Claude AI — Deep Analysis
nodes.notes: Calls Claude API for structured lead analysis: ICP fit, buying signals, pain points, urgency assessment.

nodes.name: Build Enriched Lead + Confidence
nodes.notes: Parses AI analysis, computes weighted confidence score across all data sources, flags low-confidence leads for review.

nodes.name: Confidence >= 40%?
nodes.notes: Route based on confidence: >= 40% proceeds to qualification, < 40% goes to human review queue.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { email: $json.raw_lead.email, firstname: $json.raw_lead.first_name, lastname: $json.raw_lead.last_name, company: $json.company?.legal_name, jobtitle: $json.contact?.normalized_title, ai_icp_fit_score: String(Math.round(($json.ai_analysis?.icp_fit_score || 0) * 100)), ai_enrichment_confidence: String(Math.round($json.overall_data_confidence * 100)), ai_urgency: $json.ai_analysis?.urgency_assessment || 'unknown', ai_company_summary: ($json.ai_analysis?.company_summary || '').substring(0, 2000), ai_buying_signals: ($json.ai_analysis?.buying_signals || []).map(s => s.signal).join('; ').substring(0, 2000) } }) }}

nodes.name: Sync to HubSpot
nodes.notes: Creates/updates HubSpot contact with all enrichment data and AI analysis results.

nodes.name: Slack — Lead Alert
nodes.notes: Posts enriched lead summary to Slack for visibility.

nodes.name: Slack — Review Queue
nodes.notes: Low-confidence leads go to Slack review queue for human triage.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'enriched', lead_id: $json.raw_lead.email, confidence: $json.overall_data_confidence, flags: $json.flags, icp_fit: $json.ai_analysis?.icp_fit_score }) }}

nodes.name: Respond — Enriched
nodes.notes: Returns enrichment summary to the webhook caller.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'validation_failed', error: 'No email or company domain provided' }) }}

nodes.name: Respond — Invalid
nodes.notes: Returns 422 when lead has no identifiers.
